div.p:
Component: Memory Allocator Security Layer
Mechanism: Bitmap-based state tracking to prevent heap corruption and Use-After-Free (UAF).

g.title: Converts raw pointer to pool-relative block index

div.p: Security Rule: Free(p) is only idempotent if the bitmap tracks state. Without this check, the same pointer is added to the free-list twice, creating a circular linked list.
Every block exists in exactly one state:

g.title: Converts raw pointer to pool-relative block index
